home.title: Acme Console
home.description: A branded workspace for customer operations, file review, billing health and AI-assisted daily work.

about.title: About Acme Console
about.description: Built for teams that need clear operations, fast customer follow-up and reliable workspace governance.
about.body: Acme Console brings tasks, files, billing signals and customer context into one branded workspace so teams can move from intake to resolution without losing operational control.

pricing.title: Plans for every operations team
pricing.description: Start with a focused workspace, then scale automation, files, billing and analytics as your product grows.

plans.name: Launch
plans.detail: For a focused product team validating its first customer operations workflow.

plans.name: Scale
plans.detail: For teams running multiple workspaces, background jobs and file workflows.

plans.name: Platform
plans.detail: For branded deployments with custom providers and operational policy.

contact.title: Talk to Acme
contact.description: Tell us about your workspace, your customer operations flow and the outcomes you want to improve.
contact.failed: Message failed. Check the required fields.
contact.name: Name
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about the white-label product you want to build.

docs.title: Docs center
docs.description: Unify product docs, developer guides, and support content in replaceable pages.
docs.body: Use the Acme documentation portal to plan page ownership, theme tokens, workspace entry points, and verification workflows before shipping a branded product.

privacy.title: Acme Privacy
privacy.description: How Acme Console protects customer, workspace and operational data.
privacy.body: This sample privacy page covers account data, uploaded files, operational events, retention and provider processing. Production deployments should replace this text with their real data handling policies.

terms.title: Acme Terms
terms.description: Clear account, billing and workspace usage terms for Acme Console customers.
terms.body: These sample terms describe responsible use, account ownership, payment handling, file governance and workspace administration. Production deployments should replace this text with their real legal terms.

auth.supportingText: Use one secure account to access your workspace, customer records, files and billing history.
auth.error: Account information is incorrect. Check it and try again.

login.title: Sign in to Acme Console
login.description: Use the host identity service through a brand-owned login page.

register.title: Create your Acme account
register.description: Open a workspace while the host keeps auth, sessions and policy enforcement.

forgot-password.title: Recover your Acme account
forgot-password.description: Request a reset link from the host identity service.

reset-password.title: Reset your Acme password
reset-password.description: Set a new password while host security boundaries stay in place.

dashboardHome.title: Welcome back
dashboardHome.description: Review today's workspace priorities, files, billing health and customer signals.
dashboardHome.signedInDescription: Signed in as {email}. Review today's workspace priorities and customer signals.
cards: Module work can define the product-facing overview.

Automations are healthy and ready for today's work.
